# CANetworkBrowserWindowController

**Class**

A window controller that displays available network audio devices.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor class CANetworkBrowserWindowController
```

## Creating a Window Controller

- **init()**: Creates a new network browser window controller.

## Determining Audio Video Bridging (AVB) Support

- **isAVBSupported()**: Returns a Boolean value that indicates whether the current machine hardware supports Audio Video Bridging (AVB).

## Inherits From

- NSWindowController

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCoding
- NSObjectProtocol
- NSSeguePerforming
- NSStandardKeyBindingResponding
- NSTouchBarProvider
- NSUserActivityRestoring
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
